text: paulos desmios christou iēsou kai timotheos o adelphos philēmoni tō agapētō kai synergō ēmōn
kai apphia tē agapētē kai archippō tō systratiōtē ēmōn kai tē kat oikon sou ekklēsia
charis ymin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kyriou iēsou christou
eucharistō tō theō mou pantote mneian sou poioumenos epi tōn proseuchōn mou
akouōn sou tēn agapēn kai tēn pistin ēn echeis pros ton kyrion iēsoun kai eis pantas tous agious
opōs ē koinōnia tēs pisteōs sou energēs genētai en epignōsei pantos agathou tou en ymin eis christon iēsoun
charan gar echomen pollēn kai paraklēsin epi tē agapē sou oti ta splanchna tōn agiōn anapepautai dia sou adelphe
dio pollēn en christō parrēsian echōn epitassein soi to anēkon
dia tēn agapēn mallon parakalō toioutos ōn ōs paulos presbytēs nyni de kai desmios iēsou christou
parakalō se peri tou emou teknou on egennēsa en tois desmois mou onēsimon
ton pote soi achrēston nyni de soi kai emoi euchrēston on anepempsa
sy de auton tout estin ta ema splanchna proslabou
on egō eboulomēn pros emauton katechein ina yper sou diakonē moi en tois desmois tou euangeliou
chōris de tēs sēs gnōmēs ouden ēthelēsa poiēsai ina mē ōs kata anankēn to agathon sou ē alla kata ekousion
tacha gar dia touto echōristhē pros ōran ina aiōnion auton apechēs
ouketi ōs doulon all yper doulon adelphon agapēton malista emoi posō de mallon soi kai en sarki kai en kyriō
ei oun eme echeis koinōnon proslabou auton ōs eme
ei de ti ēdikēsen se ē opheilei touto emoi ellogei
egō paulos egrapsa tē emē cheiri egō apotisō ina mē legō soi oti kai seauton moi prosopheileis
nai adelphe egō sou onaimēn en kyriō anapauson mou ta splanchna en kyriō
pepoithōs tē ypakoē sou egrapsa soi eidōs oti kai yper o legō poiēseis
ama de kai etoimaze moi xenian elpizō gar oti dia tōn proseuchōn ymōn charisthēsomai ymin
aspazontai se epaphras o synaichmalōtos mou en christō iēsou
markos aristarchos dēmas loukas oi synergoi mou
ē charis tou kyriou ēmōn iēsou christou meta tou pneumatos ymōn amēn [pros philēmona egraphē apo rōmēs dia onēsimou oiketou]
